source_crs.name: WGS 84 longitude/latitude as provided in public GeoJSON/CSV geometry exports
source_crs.evidence_status: Release geometry values are encoded as GeoJSON-style longitude/latitude coordinates; confirm exact upstream CRS wording again before DOI deposit.

processing_metric_crs.name: Local equirectangular Portugal metric workspace
processing_metric_crs.usage: Endpoint clustering, facility-distance checks, corridor-distance checks and length/coverage diagnostics.

release_geometry_encoding.distance_fields: Fields ending in _m use metres; fields ending in _km use kilometres.
release_geometry_encoding.missing_geometry: Empty string, null, NaN, or MISSING_NOT_ESTIMATED depending on source artifact.

claim_boundary: Coordinate and distance fields support reproducible candidate-topology reconstruction and validation. They do not imply operator-validated asset positions or operational grid-model readiness.
